zh.lifeSummary: 當William de Stuteville於大約1189年出生在英國英格蘭諾福爾可格雷哈爾時，他的父親Osmund de Stuteville75歲，母親Isabel Gressenhall36歲。他於大約1220年與Margaret de Saye在英國英格蘭艾可結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1259年在英國越可爾瑟斯克享年72歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William de Stuteville于大约1189年出生在英国英格兰諾福爾可格雷哈爾时，他的父亲Osmund de Stuteville75岁，母亲Isabel Gressenhall36岁。他于大约1220年与Margaret de Saye在英国英格兰艾可结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1259年在英国越可爾瑟斯克享年72岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Stuteville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Estouteville or Etoutteville in Seine-Maritime.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When William de Stuteville was born about 1189, in Gressenhall, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, his father, Osmund de Stuteville, was 75 and his mother, Isabel Gressenhall, was 36. He married Margaret de Saye about 1220, in Essex, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died about 1259, in Thirsk, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 72.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William de Stuteville est né environ 1189, à Gressenhall, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Osmund de Stuteville, avait 75 ans et sa mère, Isabel Gressenhall, avait 36 ans. Il a épousé Margaret de Saye environ 1220, à Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé environ 1259, à Thirsk, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 72 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als William de Stuteville um 1189 in Gressenhall, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Osmund de Stuteville 75 und seine Mutter Isabel Gressenhall 36. Er hat um 1220 in Essex, England, United Kingdom Margaret de Saye geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb um 1259 im Alter von 72 Jahren in Thirsk, Yorkshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William de Stuteville è nato il circa 1189 nel Gressenhall, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Osmund de Stuteville, aveva 75 anni e il suo madre, Isabel Gressenhall, aveva 36 anni. Lui sposato Margaret de Saye circa 1220, nel Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì circa 1259, nel Thirsk, Yorkshire, England, all'età di 72 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: William de Stuteville(이)가 대략 1189년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 그레센홀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Osmund de Stuteville(은)는 75세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabel Gressenhall(은)는 36세였다. 그는 대략 1220년 영국 잉글랜드 에세스에서 Margaret de Saye(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1259년 영국 요르크실르 스이르스크에서 72세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William de Stuteville родился около 1189 г. в местности грессенолл, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Osmund de Stuteville было 75 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabel Gressenhall, 36. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret de Saye около 1220 г. в местности эссекс, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер около 1259 г. в местности тирск, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 72 лет.
